domainAdd.title: Add your first domain
domainAdd.body: Start by adding a domain you own. Click Add domain and enter it — this is the sender address your emails will come from.

domainVerify.title: Verify with DNS
domainVerify.body: After adding a domain you'll get DNS records (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) to add at your provider. Once they propagate, verify the domain — inbox, mailboxes, templates and sending unlock automatically.

mailboxCreate.title: Create your first mailbox
mailboxCreate.body: Your domain is verified. Create a mailbox to send and receive mail from an address on your domain — you'll get SMTP/IMAP credentials to connect any client.

templates.title: Templates
templates.name: Template name
templates.subject: Subject line
templates.testSendNoMailbox: Create a mailbox on this template's domain to send a test.
templates.missingVarsWarn: Empty variables will appear as literal placeholders: {vars}
templates.confirmDeleteDesc: "{name}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
templates.exportSuccess: {count, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}} exported
templates.noMatch: No templates match the current filter.
templates.importDescription: Drop a JSON file with template definitions. Supported fields: name, subject, content / mjmlBody, variables.
templates.importDrop: Drop a JSON file or click to browse
templates.importDropHint: Array of templates with localized subject + content
templates.importEmpty: No importable templates found in the file
templates.importFound: {count, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}} detected
templates.importSuccess: {count, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}} imported
templates.importFailedAll: Failed to import {count, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}}

domains.title: Domains
domains.emptyDescription: Add your first domain to start sending emails.
domains.dnsDescription: Add the following DNS records to your domain provider:
domains.confirmDeleteDesc: "{name}" and its DNS/DKIM configuration will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

credentials.title: Mail Server Credentials
credentials.mailboxDescription: Use these settings to connect this mailbox from any IMAP or SMTP client.
credentials.passwordHint: Set when the mailbox is created
credentials.imapMailboxIntro: Connect this mailbox from any IMAP client (Thunderbird, Mail.app, etc.) to read your inbox.
credentials.smtpMailboxIntro: Use these settings in any SMTP client to send email from this mailbox.

mailboxes.title: Mailboxes
mailboxes.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this mailbox?
mailboxes.deleteCatchAllWarn: This mailbox is the catch-all destination for its domain. Deleting it will also turn off the catch-all for that domain.
mailboxes.emptyDescription: Create your first mailbox to start receiving emails.
mailboxes.mailboxCreatedExistingUser: Mailbox + access granted to existing Sentroy user {email}. Their account password was not changed.
mailboxes.mailboxCreatedSyncFailed: Mailbox created but Sentroy user sync failed for {email}: {reason}
mailboxes.createAccountInfo: Creating this mailbox also creates a Sentroy user with the same email + password. The user can sign in to sentroy.com with these credentials and will only see this mailbox in their inbox by default.
mailboxes.catchAllDescription: All messages sent to any address @{domain} will land here, even if no specific mailbox exists.
mailboxes.catchAllWarning: Other mailboxes on this domain will be deleted. Only this mailbox will receive mail. This cannot be undone — make sure no important data is in those mailboxes.
mailboxes.catchAllExistingWarning: This domain already has a catch-all → {target}. Creating a new specific mailbox here may not receive any mail until catch-all is removed.
mailboxes.catchAllConfirmDescription: Enabling catch-all will permanently delete {count} existing mailbox(es) on this domain. Their messages will be lost. This cannot be undone.
mailboxes.ruleNoFolders: No custom folders yet. Create one from the inbox first.
mailboxes.ruleFutureNotApplied: Applies to messages already in INBOX. Future arrivals are not auto-moved yet.
mailboxes.ruleConflictCategory: This sender already has a rule pinning it to {category}. Saving will overwrite it.
mailboxes.ruleConflictMove: This sender already has a rule moving it to {folder}. Saving will overwrite it.
mailboxes.rulesEmpty: No rules yet. Pin senders to override the AI classifier or auto-organize them into folders.
mailboxes.ruleDeleteDesc: Future messages from this sender go back to the AI classifier. Already-classified or already-moved messages keep their current placement.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subject: Subject
inbox.threadCountTooltip: {count, plural, one {1 message in thread} other {# messages in thread}}
inbox.senderBlocked: {email} blocked — future messages will be hidden
inbox.blockedSendersList: {count, plural, one {1 blocked sender} other {# blocked senders}}
inbox.noMailboxesDescription: Create a mailbox first to view your inbox.
inbox.selectMailboxFirst: Select a mailbox to get started
inbox.moveToSpamConfirm: This message will be moved to the spam folder.
inbox.deleteMessageConfirm: This message and any thread replies will be permanently deleted.
inbox.unsubscribeDesc: You will be removed from this sender's mailing list.
inbox.unsubscribeDescWithTarget: We'll send the unsubscribe request to {target}. You'll be removed from this sender's mailing list.
inbox.trackerBlocked: {count, plural, one {1 remote asset blocked} other {# remote assets blocked}}
inbox.trackerHint: External images and trackers won't load until you allow them.
inbox.deleteFolderDesc: "{name}" folder and all its messages will be permanently deleted.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Translate, summarize or draft a reply

summarize.intro: Get a quick TL;DR, key points and action items.

reply.intentLabel: What do you want to say?
reply.intentPlaceholder: e.g. Confirm the meeting on Thursday and ask for the agenda

ai.intentRequired: Please describe what you want to say

inbox.unsubscribeOneClickDesc: The sender supports one-click unsubscribe. Sentroy will POST the request from the server — you stay on this page.
inbox.attachmentPartIdMissing: Server returned no part id for this attachment. Try refreshing the message.
inbox.bulkDeleteDesc: {count} message(s) will be permanently deleted from this folder.
inbox.bulkDeleteFailedAll: None of the selected messages could be deleted
inbox.bulkMoveFailedAll: Could not move any of the selected messages
inbox.emptyTrashDesc: All {count} message(s) in Trash will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

send.title: Send Email
send.subject: Subject

ai.label: AI
ai.composePromptPlaceholder: e.g. Apologize for the delayed shipment and offer a 10% credit
ai.bodyRequired: Write something first to enhance or change tone

send.closeConfirmDesc: You have unsent content. Save it as a draft so you can pick up where you left off?
send.draftRestored: Draft restored from your last session
send.draftSavedLocally: Saved on this device only — couldn't reach the mail server. Try saving again when online.

audience.title: Audience
audience.name: Name
audience.noMembersYet: No members in this list yet.
audience.addFirstMember: Add your first member using the search above.
audience.confirmDeleteContactDesc: This will permanently remove {email}. This action cannot be undone.
audience.confirmDeleteListDesc: This will permanently delete the "{name}" list and remove all its members. Contacts are not deleted.
audience.emptyContactsDesc: Add contacts to build your audience.
audience.emptyListsDesc: Create lists to organize your contacts.

logs.title: Logs
logs.subject: Subject
logs.emptyDescription: Email logs will appear here once you start sending.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.createDescription: Set up a webhook to receive event notifications.
webhooks.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook?
webhooks.emptyDescription: Create a webhook to receive event notifications.
webhooks.testDescription: Fire a custom payload at this webhook URL. Result + delivery row recorded for inspection.
webhooks.noDeliveries: No test or replay deliveries yet.

suppressions.title: Suppressions
suppressions.addDescription: Add an email address to the suppression list.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.createDescription: Create a new API key to access the Sentroy API.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.scopeRequired: At least one scope is required
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create an API key to integrate with the Sentroy API.
apiKeys.keyCreatedDescription: Copy your API key now. You will not be able to see it again.
apiKeys.keyWarning: This key will only be shown once. Store it securely.
apiKeys.confirmRevokeDesc: "{name}" will be permanently revoked and requests using this key will fail. This cannot be undone.

smtp.title: SMTP Credentials
smtp.createDescription: Create SMTP credentials for sending emails.
smtp.name: Name
smtp.emptyDescription: Create SMTP credentials to send emails via SMTP.
smtp.connectionDescription: Use these settings to connect your email client or application.
smtp.credentialsDescription: Copy your credentials now. The password will not be shown again.
smtp.passwordWarning: This password will only be shown once. Store it securely.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.defaultLimitsDescription: Default limits applied to new accounts and companies.
admin.name: Name
admin.deleteCompanyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will also remove all members.
admin.applicablePlanIds: Applicable Plan IDs (comma separated, empty = all)

validate.title: Email Validation
validate.singleDescription: Enter an email address to check its validity.
validate.batchDescription: Enter up to 100 email addresses, one per line.

dnsAutoconfig.title: DNS Setup
dnsAutoconfig.manualSetupDesc: Copy and paste DNS records to your provider's dashboard.

domainConnect.title: One-click DNS setup
domainConnect.description: Your domain uses {providerName}, which supports automatic DNS setup. No API keys needed.
domainConnect.redirectExplanation: You will be redirected to {providerName} to approve the DNS changes.

bimi.title: BIMI Configuration
bimi.description: Configure Brand Indicators for Message Identification (BIMI) for {domain}. Your brand logo will appear next to your emails in supported inboxes.
bimi.logoUrlHint: HTTPS URL to your SVG logo (tiny-ps profile, square, under 32KB, solid background).
bimi.vmcUrlHint: CA-issued BIMI CMC/VMC certificate (.pem). Leave empty for self-asserted BIMI; required by some clients like Gmail.
bimi.dnsRecordHint: Add this TXT record to your DNS provider.
bimi.domainNotActive: BIMI can only be configured for verified (active) domains. Please verify your domain first.
bimi.notVerified: BIMI record not found in DNS. It may take time to propagate.

templateLibraryBrowse.title: Template library
templateLibraryBrowse.description: Pick a curated template, clone it into your catalogue, then customise.
templateLibraryBrowse.empty: No public templates in this category yet.
templateLibraryBrowse.domainRequired: Pick a domain to clone into.
templateLibraryBrowse.collectionCloned: {count, plural, one {# template} other {# templates}} cloned from the collection.

aiCompose.title: Generate with AI
aiCompose.description: Describe what the email should do — pick an existing template as the style reference if you'd like.
aiCompose.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Welcome new users to ACME, with a CTA to verify their email
aiCompose.exampleHint: AI will match the tone and structure of the chosen template.
aiCompose.notesPlaceholder: e.g. Keep it under 80 words, friendly tone
aiCompose.applied: AI draft applied to the editor
aiCompose.generateFailed: Couldn't generate. Try a different prompt or fewer languages.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Open rates, click-through, bounce — last {days} days
analytics.noData: No data for this window. Send some email to see analytics here.
